headline: AMT Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Higher Property Revenues
summary: AMT's Q1 FFO tops estimates by 13.6% as property revenue growth lifts results, prompting higher 2026 outlook midpoints.

headline: ARE Q1 FFO Matches Estimates, Revenues Top on Tenant Collections
summary: ARE meets Q1 FFO estimates as leasing stays active and liquidity remains strong despite revenue decline and occupancy pressure.
